_note: Aesthetic DIRECTIONS = the heart of the variety engine. Each is a distinct design movement with its own visual DNA. Pick (or sample via scripts/ideate.py) ONE direction per graphic and hand-build to it — never reuse the same direction twice in a row. directions x palettes x fonts x layouts x motifs = tens of thousands of distinct looks. example_palettes/example_fonts reference data/palettes.json + data/fonts.json ids; motifs reference data/motifs.json. Treat them as strong hints, not handcuffs.

directions.name: Editorial Vintage
directions.vibe: Cream-paper magazine spread: big serif headline, an orange accent, hand-drawn arrows and sketchy underlines, the odd doodle.
directions.type: Serif display (Fraunces / Playfair / DM Serif) + clean sans body. One word per headline coloured with the accent.
directions.bg: Warm paper (#F3EBDD-ish) + subtle grain; NOT pure white.
directions.layout: Left-anchored headline, generous margins, a small illustrated/iconographic anchor.
directions.avoid: Cold greys, neon, flat vector with no texture.

directions.name: Bold Designer Grotesk
directions.vibe: Massive black grotesk headline, centered, on a light grainy gradient; rounded device/screenshot cards float below.
directions.type: Heavy grotesk display (Archivo Black / Bricolage / Familjen), tight tracking, huge. Minimal body.
directions.bg: Light grey grainy gradient (#EDEFF2 → #E2E6EC) with noise.
directions.layout: Centered hero headline up top, card grid or single mockup below.
directions.avoid: Decorative serifs, busy backgrounds, more than one accent.

directions.name: Blueprint / Diagram
directions.vibe: Engineering grid-paper: bold headline, architecture boxes + arrows, connector dots, mono labels, a handwritten accent line.
directions.type: Bold grotesk headline + mono labels; one handwritten-script accent sentence.
directions.bg: Pale blue/grey grid paper (faint ruled grid lines).
directions.layout: Headline top, labelled diagram/flow in the middle, takeaway line bottom.
directions.avoid: Gradient meshes, glossy 3D, decorative fluff that fights the diagram.

directions.name: Sticker & Doodle Tutorial
directions.vibe: Notebook-meets-sticker: phone/mockup, value cards, marker highlights, sticker stars, a code/quote block + a 'WHY' note.
directions.type: Friendly grotesk + an accent label colour; small mono for code/notes.
directions.bg: Off-white or faint grid with a soft tint.
directions.layout: Two-column: visual/mockup on one side, annotated points on the other.
directions.avoid: Stiff corporate tone, no texture, everything one size.

directions.name: Bold Poster
directions.vibe: Gallery poster: oversized condensed type locked to the grid, a single gradient orb or duotone photo doing the heavy lifting.
directions.type: Condensed/heavy display (Anton / Bebas / Big Shoulders) at extreme scale.
directions.bg: Dark or single saturated field with one soft gradient orb glow.
directions.layout: Type pinned top/bottom, the orb/photo as the focal mass between.
directions.avoid: Multiple competing elements; this is one idea, huge.

directions.name: Swiss / International
directions.vibe: Strict grid, ruthless hierarchy, oceans of whitespace, one red accent. Order as the aesthetic.
directions.type: Neutral-but-crisp grotesk, left-aligned, tight leading. No decoration.
directions.bg: Flat off-white or flat black. Texture optional and minimal.
directions.layout: Columnar grid; a thin rule and an index number; everything aligned.
directions.avoid: Centered everything, gradients, doodles, more than one accent.

directions.name: Neo-Brutalism
directions.vibe: Thick black borders, hard offset drop-shadows, candy-bright blocks, chunky everything.
directions.type: Heavy grotesk, oversized, in solid blocks; high contrast.
directions.bg: One bright flat colour; black 2-3px borders everywhere.
directions.layout: Blocky cards with offset shadows, slight rotation, sticker accents.
directions.avoid: Soft gradients, blur, thin hairlines, timid colour.

directions.name: Glass / Aurora
directions.vibe: Frosted glass panels floating over a soft aurora/mesh gradient, with fine inner-border highlights.
directions.type: Clean modern grotesk; medium weight; lots of breathing room.
directions.bg: Aurora mesh gradient (2-3 soft radial blooms) behind blurred panels.
directions.layout: One glass card holding the message, centered over the gradient.
directions.avoid: Hard borders, flat fills, harsh shadows, busy textures.

directions.name: Dark Luxe
directions.vibe: Near-black canvas, a whisper of gold/champagne, an elegant serif, enormous negative space.
directions.type: High-contrast serif display + delicate tracked sans caps for labels.
directions.bg: Charcoal/black with a single faint top glow; subtle grain.
directions.layout: Tiny eyebrow, centered serif statement, vast space around it.
directions.avoid: Clutter, bright candy colour, heavy textures, more than one accent.

directions.name: Neon Cyber
directions.vibe: Black field, glowing neon strokes, scanlines, a techno HUD energy.
directions.type: Techy grotesk/mono, glowing text-shadow on the headline.
directions.bg: Deep black/navy with neon radial glows + faint scanlines.
directions.layout: Centered glowing headline, HUD-style corner labels.
directions.avoid: Pastels, paper textures, serif type, low contrast.

directions.name: Risograph Print
directions.vibe: Two-colour risograph overprint: misregistered layers, halftone dots, paper grain, indie-zine charm.
directions.type: Chunky grotesk or condensed; overprinted in the two riso inks.
directions.bg: Off-white paper grain; shapes printed in 2 inks that overlap/multiply.
directions.layout: Bold shapes + type, deliberately slightly off-register.
directions.avoid: Smooth gradients, glossy depth, photoreal imagery.

directions.name: Memphis Pop
directions.vibe: 80s Memphis: confetti squiggles, dots, zigzags, primary-ish pops, geometric confetti.
directions.type: Rounded or chunky grotesk, bouncy, multi-weight.
directions.bg: Light or pastel field scattered with geometric confetti shapes.
directions.layout: Playful asymmetry, shapes framing the message.
directions.avoid: Serious/luxury tone, monochrome, heavy dark.

directions.name: Y2K Chrome
directions.vibe: Early-2000s chrome: glossy metallic gradients, bubble type, sparkles, baby-blue/silver.
directions.type: Bubbly/heavy display with a chrome or gradient fill; sparkle accents.
directions.bg: Cool chrome gradient or pastel-y2k field.
directions.layout: Centered chrome wordmark, sparkles orbiting it.
directions.avoid: Earthy/craft palettes, serif, matte flatness.

directions.name: Vaporwave
directions.vibe: Pink/teal sunset gradient, a perspective grid horizon, retro-futuristic dream haze.
directions.type: Wide or italic display, sometimes Japanese-style spacing; soft glow.
directions.bg: Magenta→cyan gradient with a vanishing-point grid floor.
directions.layout: Centered statement above a grid horizon, sun/orb behind.
directions.avoid: Corporate cleanliness, paper texture, hard borders.

directions.name: Magazine Editorial
directions.vibe: Print-magazine layout: multi-column, a drop cap, a hero photo, refined serif/grotesk mix.
directions.type: Serif headline + sans body in columns; a large drop cap.
directions.bg: Photo-led or clean paper; editorial restraint.
directions.layout: Masthead + columns + captioned image; magazine grid.
directions.avoid: Neon, doodles, chunky neo-brutalism, single-block centering.

directions.name: Kinetic Typography
directions.vibe: The type IS the composition: oversized, overlapping, cropped at the edges, baseline-shifted.
directions.type: One distinctive display family pushed to extremes; mixed sizes/weights.
directions.bg: Single field; the type bleeds off-canvas as the visual.
directions.layout: Type spans the whole canvas, intentional overlap and crop.
directions.avoid: Imagery competing with the type; timid sizing.

directions.name: Soft Gradient Mesh
directions.vibe: Big soft mesh-gradient field, minimal type, lots of air — calm and premium.
directions.type: Light/medium modern grotesk; restrained, centered or lower-left.
directions.bg: 2-3 large soft radial blooms blended; barely-there grain.
directions.layout: One short line of type over a beautiful gradient; nothing else.
directions.avoid: Hard edges, clutter, many elements, harsh contrast borders.

directions.name: Organic / Natural
directions.vibe: Flowing blob shapes, earthy tones, soft serif, a leaf/photo touch — warm and human.
directions.type: Soft serif or humanist sans; gentle, never aggressive.
directions.bg: Warm earthy field with one large organic blob shape.
directions.layout: Blob anchors one corner; calm left-aligned message.
directions.avoid: Neon, hard tech edges, cold greys, glossy chrome.

directions.name: Art Deco
directions.vibe: 1920s glamour: symmetric geometry, gold linework, fan/sunburst motifs, refined caps.
directions.type: Elegant high-contrast serif or deco caps; tracked, symmetrical.
directions.bg: Deep jewel/black with thin gold geometric frames.
directions.layout: Centered, symmetrical, framed; ornament top and bottom.
directions.avoid: Asymmetry, doodles, candy colour, casual type.

directions.name: Collage / Cut-out
directions.vibe: Mixed-media scrapbook: torn-paper edges, tape, overlapping photos, ransom-note type, marker scrawl.
directions.type: Mixed sizes/families intentionally; cut-and-paste energy.
directions.bg: Paper or bold field with layered torn fragments.
directions.layout: Overlapping layered fragments; controlled chaos.
directions.avoid: Sterile grids, single flat fill, corporate restraint.

directions.name: Mono / Terminal
directions.vibe: Code-editor aesthetic: monospace everything, a prompt caret, subtle syntax-colour accents.
directions.type: Monospace throughout; size contrast for hierarchy; a blinking-caret motif.
directions.bg: Dark editor charcoal or warm paper-terminal; faint dotted grid.
directions.layout: Left-aligned mono block, // comment labels, one accent line.
directions.avoid: Serif, gradients, decorative flourishes, photoreal art.

directions.name: Minimal Photo
directions.vibe: One beautiful photo, a tiny serif caption, immense calm — the 'Simplicity is sophistication' look.
directions.type: Small refined serif or tracked sans caption; never competes with the photo.
directions.bg: A single hero photo (or generated image) with a quiet overlay.
directions.layout: Photo dominant; one short caption in a calm corner.
directions.avoid: Loud type, many elements, gradients fighting the photo.

directions.name: Bauhaus Block
directions.vibe: Primary blocks, circles and bars, strict geometry, functional and confident.
directions.type: Geometric grotesk; primary colour blocks behind/around the type.
directions.bg: Off-white or one primary; geometric shapes as structure.
directions.layout: Composition built from primary shapes; type locked into the grid.
directions.avoid: Gradients, soft blur, photoreal, doodly handdrawn.

directions.name: Corporate Clean
directions.vibe: Trustworthy SaaS: clean rounded cards, one confident blue/accent, friendly grotesk — but executed sharply so it never reads generic.
directions.type: Clean grotesk, clear hierarchy, comfortable sizing.
directions.bg: Light surface or soft single-hue tint; minimal, crisp.
directions.layout: Headline + supporting line + one clean card or chart.
directions.avoid: Defaulting to purple-on-white; generic stock-y blandness. Earn it with sharp spacing + one strong accent.
